display.purpose: Hero headlines, monumental lockup, largest type on the page. Fraunces.

body.purpose: Paragraphs, descriptions, content text. DM Sans. Max 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Buttons, nav links, category badges, frame tags. DM Sans, uppercase.

shadows.name: ambient-soft
shadows.purpose: Diffuse subtle shadow for mild lift on dark surfaces.

shadows.name: ambient-medium
shadows.purpose: Moderate lift for cards or modals.

shadows.name: accent-glow
shadows.purpose: Hover glow on accent-colored elements. Atmospheric.

shadows.name: gold-glow
shadows.purpose: Hover glow on gold-accented elements. Decorative.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Primary easing. Reveals, entrances, hover transitions.

motion.name: ease-editorial
motion.purpose: Slow, dramatic reveals. Hero boot sequence.

motion.name: duration-slower
motion.purpose: Hero reveals, page transitions, dramatic entrances.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Sharp rectangular button for main CTAs on dark backgrounds.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.625rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 0.875rem 2rem; cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid #f0ede8; background: #f0ede8; color: #080808; transition: background 100ms ease, border-color 100ms ease, color 100ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #e8622a; border-color: #e8622a; color: #f0ede8; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e8622a; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Transparent button with border for secondary actions on dark backgrounds.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.625rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 0.875rem 2rem; cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid #242424; background: transparent; color: #f0ede8; transition: background 100ms ease, border-color 100ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #111111; border-color: #5a5550; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e8622a; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Screen Frame
components.description: Cinematic inset border with corner brackets and optional tags. Signature spatial device.
components.html: EDITORIALGRANADA
components.css: .ds-screen-frame { position: absolute; inset: 1.5rem; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06); pointer-events: none; z-index: 20; } .ds-corner { position: absolute; width: 12px; height: 12px; } .ds-corner::before, .ds-corner::after { content: ''; position: absolute; background: rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.45); } .ds-corner::before { width: 12px; height: 1px; } .ds-corner::after { width: 1px; height: 12px; } .ds-corner-tl { top: -1px; left: -1px; } .ds-corner-tl::before { top: 0; left: 0; } .ds-corner-tl::after { top: 0; left: 0; } .ds-corner-tr { top: -1px; right: -1px; } .ds-corner-tr::before { top: 0; right: 0; } .ds-corner-tr::after { top: 0; right: 0; } .ds-corner-bl { bottom: -1px; left: -1px; } .ds-corner-bl::before { bottom: 0; left: 0; } .ds-corner-bl::after { bottom: 0; left: 0; } .ds-corner-br { bottom: -1px; right: -1px; } .ds-corner-br::before { bottom: 0; right: 0; } .ds-corner-br::after { bottom: 0; right: 0; } .ds-frame-tag { position: absolute; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-frame-tag-tl { top: -1.5rem; left: 0; } .ds-frame-tag-br { bottom: -1.5rem; right: 0; }

components.name: Dark Card
components.description: Content container for dark sections with corner bracket hover reveal.
components.html:
Festival de Música

12 Jun · Teatro Isabel
components.css: .ds-card-dark { position: relative; background: #171717; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-card-dark:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); } .ds-card-dark .ds-card-img-wrap { position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-dark .ds-card-img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; display: block; filter: grayscale(25%) contrast(1.05) brightness(0.8); transform: scale(1.08); transition: filter 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.19, 1, 0.22, 1), transform 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.19, 1, 0.22, 1); } .ds-card-dark:hover .ds-card-img { filter: grayscale(0%) brightness(0.88); transform: scale(1); } .ds-card-dark .ds-card-body { padding: 1.5rem; } .ds-card-dark .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.1; color: #f0ede8; margin: 0 0 0.5rem; } .ds-card-dark .ds-card-meta { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #9a9490; margin: 0; }

components.name: Light Card
components.description: Content container for light editorial sections.
components.html:
Ruta del Albaicín

2h · 3.5km · Fácil
components.css: .ds-card-light { position: relative; background: #f5f0ea; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid rgba(26, 22, 25, 0.12); transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-card-light:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); } .ds-card-light .ds-card-img-wrap { position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-light .ds-card-img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; display: block; filter: grayscale(25%) contrast(1.05) brightness(0.8); transform: scale(1.08); transition: filter 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.19, 1, 0.22, 1), transform 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.19, 1, 0.22, 1); } .ds-card-light:hover .ds-card-img { filter: grayscale(0%) brightness(0.88); transform: scale(1); } .ds-card-light .ds-card-body { padding: 1.5rem; } .ds-card-light .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.1; color: #1a1619; margin: 0 0 0.5rem; } .ds-card-light .ds-card-meta { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #5a4f47; margin: 0; }

components.name: Navigation Link
components.description: Numbered nav link with animated underline hover and active state.
components.html: [01]EVENTOS[02]RUTAS
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 2rem; align-items: center; } .ds-nav-link { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #f0ede8; text-decoration: none; padding: 0.25rem 0; transition: color 100ms ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #e8622a; } .ds-nav-link.is-active { color: #e8622a; } .ds-nav-num { color: rgba(240, 237, 232, 0.4); font-weight: 500; } .ds-nav-line { position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 1px; background: #e8622a; transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left; transition: transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover .ds-nav-line, .ds-nav-link.is-active .ds-nav-line { transform: scaleX(1); } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e8622a; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Filter Pill
components.description: Pill-shaped toggle for filtering events or routes.
components.css: .ds-pill-group { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.5rem; } .ds-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); background: transparent; color: #f0ede8; transition: background 100ms ease, border-color 100ms ease, color 100ms ease; } .ds-pill:hover { border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } .ds-pill.is-selected { background: #e8622a; border-color: #e8622a; color: #f0ede8; } .ds-pill:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e8622a; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Glass Dock
components.description: Floating pill-shaped bar with live time, weather, and CTA. The hero's signature UI element.
components.html:
14:32
☀️24°
Ver Eventos
components.css: .ds-glass-dock { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03); backdrop-filter: blur(40px) saturate(140%); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; color: #f0ede8; } .ds-dock-section { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; } .ds-dock-time { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .ds-dock-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: #e8622a; animation: pulseLive 1.5s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes pulseLive { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.4; } } .ds-dock-sep { opacity: 0.5; } .ds-dock-weather { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-dock-icon { font-size: 1rem; } .ds-dock-temp { font-weight: 500; } .ds-dock-divider { width: 1px; height: 1.5rem; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); } .ds-dock-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #f0ede8; text-decoration: none; transition: color 100ms ease; } .ds-dock-cta:hover { color: #e8622a; } .ds-dock-arrow { transition: transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-dock-cta:hover .ds-dock-arrow { transform: translateX(4px); }

narrative.overview: A palace that glows at night. The design moves from cinematic darkness into sun-lit editorial space. The hero is a portal — deep black, warm terracotta, aged gold — like standing in the Alhambra at dusk. The content sections are warm and editorial, like a beautifully printed guide left on a marble table in a boutique hotel. The transition between dark and light is the emotional journey of the site: from anticipation to discovery.
keyCharacteristics: Dual-mode palette: dark cinematic (hero/portal) and warm editorial (content/body)
Inverted font naming: CSS variables call DM Sans 'display' and Fraunces 'body'; Tailwind inverts them. The browser renders Fraunces for headlines and DM Sans for UI.
Ambient motion only: parallax, grain, screen-frame corners, subtle glow. No performative animation.
Signature patterns: Screen Frame, Grain Texture, Glass Dock, Corner Brackets, Char-by-Char Reveal

rules.name: The Dual-Mode Rule
rules.body: Every section must commit to one mode: dark or light. No mixed-mode cards within a section. The transition between sections is the palette's punctuation.

rules.name: The Terracotta Rarity Rule
rules.body: The accent appears on ≤10% of any given screen. Its power is in restraint. A hero CTA, an active nav link, a hover state — never a background fill.

rules.name: The One-Voice Rule
rules.body: The Fraunces + DM Sans pairing is the only font pairing. Never add a third font. Weight and size contrast create hierarchy, not font switches.

rules.name: The Letter-Spacing Floor
rules.body: Display headings must have letter-spacing ≥ -0.04em. Anything tighter and letters touch; cramped, not designed.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Borders and background color steps create hierarchy. Drop shadows are reserved for interactive states and atmospheric effects.

rules.name: The No-Shadow-On-Light Rule
rules.body: Light-mode sections use tonal layering through background color and subtle borders. No drop shadows on cream surfaces. The contrast between cream and ink-brown is sufficient.

dos: Do use the dual-mode palette consistently: dark sections for cinematic/hero moments, light sections for editorial content.
Do cap the accent color at ≤10% of any given screen surface. Terracotta is an exclamation point, not a paragraph.
Do use the Screen Frame on cinematic sections. It is the signature spatial device.
Do use Fraunces for headlines and DM Sans for UI/body. The inversion is documented; do not add a third font.
Do apply text-wrap: balance on h1–h3 for even line lengths.
Do use text-wrap: pretty on long prose paragraphs to reduce orphans.
Do cap body line length at 65–75ch.
Do use 0.05–0.1 extra line-height on light text against dark backgrounds. Light type reads lighter and needs more breathing room.
Do use the grain texture overlay on dark sections that feel too flat. The analog noise adds depth without shadow.
Do implement @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) for all animations. The alternative is a crossfade or instant transition.
Do use focus-visible: 2px solid var(--color-accent) with 3px offset for all interactive elements.
Do verify contrast: body text ≥4.5:1, large text ≥3:1. The WCAG AAA target is non-negotiable.
donts: Don't use generic travel-blog templates, cookie-cutter card grids, or stock hero imagery. The design must be unmistakably Granada.
Don't create flat, personality-free UI that could be any city anywhere. Every choice must signal local curation.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left or border-right > 1px) as colored accents on cards or list items. Use full borders, background tints, or nothing.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradient). Decorative, never meaningful. Use a single solid color.
Don't use glassmorphism as a default. Blurs are rare and purposeful; the Glass Dock is the one exception.
Don't use the hero-metric template (big number + small label + gradient). Not a SaaS product.
Don't use tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow text above every section heading. One deliberate kicker is voice; repeating it as grammar is AI scaffolding.
Don't use numbered section markers (01 · About / 02 · Process) as default scaffolding. Numbers earn their place only when order carries information.
Don't use all-caps body copy. Uppercase is reserved for short labels only.
Don't animate CSS layout properties (width, height, top, left) unless truly needed. Use transform and opacity.
Don't use 9999 or arbitrary z-index values. Build a semantic scale: dropdown → sticky → modal-backdrop → modal → toast → tooltip.
Don't use em dashes in copy. Use commas, colons, semicolons, periods, or parentheses.
Don't use marketing buzzwords: streamline, empower, supercharge, leverage, unleash, transform, seamless, world-class, enterprise-grade, next-generation, cutting-edge, game-changer, mission-critical.
Don't rely on color alone for difficulty indicators or category tags. Always pair with icon or text for color blindness accessibility.
Don't let text overflow its container. Test headings at every breakpoint. If a long word plus a large clamp scale causes overflow, reduce the clamp max or rewrite the copy.
